action_set_definitions.name: get_budget_and_sla_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current remaining budget and the global network SLA threshold.

action_set_definitions.name: get_site_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of hosts at a specific site, including their total/available CPU cores and a list of currently running workloads.

site_id.description: The ID of the site to scan (e.g., 'Edge-Site-Alpha').

action_set_definitions.name: get_network_topology
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves links connected to a specific site, including current capacity, current load, and upgrade costs.

site_id.description: The ID of the site to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: migrate_workload
action_set_definitions.description: Migrates a workload (VM/Container) from its current host to a target host to free up resources.

workload_id.description: The ID of the workload to migrate.

target_host_id.description: The ID of the destination host.

action_set_definitions.name: deploy_network_function
action_set_definitions.description: Instantiates a specific network function on a designated host.

nf_type.description: The type of NF to deploy (e.g., 'UPF-Core-Heavy').

host_id.description: The ID of the host where the NF will be deployed.

action_set_definitions.name: upgrade_link_capacity
action_set_definitions.description: Increases the bandwidth capacity of a specific network link.

link_id.description: The ID of the link to upgrade.

added_capacity_gbps.description: The amount of capacity to add in Gbps.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_network_performance
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates traffic based on current configuration and forecasted demand to check SLA compliance.

state_description.nodes: List of network nodes (routers/data centers) and their processing capacities.
state_description.links: Dictionary of links between nodes, including 'capacity_gbps', 'current_load_gbps', 'latency_ms', and 'cost_per_gb'.
